name: RS232OnReceive
title: RS232OnReceive
syntax: RS232OnReceive( dword port, byte buffer[], dword number );
description: Callback handler for reception of data at a serial port.

parameters.name: port
parameters.description: A number between 1 and 255 identifying a serial port.

parameters.name: buffer
parameters.description: The buffer given to the start receive call.

parameters.name: Note The number of received bytes will vary strongly with the speed of the connection.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
